regions.reason: CSS backdrop-filter cannot reproduce NSVisualEffectView menu material; blur radius and material bias are emulator calibration (--sk-emulator-*), and any reference capture samples the live desktop rather than the synthetic backdrop.
Canvas 2D approximation of fx_starfield; colors are token-exact, geometry/phase are not.

Source math says the SDK terminal's GPUI HintStrip footer never paints: the 700pt shell (render_prompts/term.rs content_height = layout::MAX_HEIGHT) sits below the 38pt context header inside a clipped flex box (~662pt), so the strip band (shell y 664-700) starts past the clip line. Additionally the entity is sized with FOOTER_HEIGHT=30 (prompt_handler/mod.rs:2219-2221) while the strip is HINT_STRIP_HEIGHT=36. The mockup keeps the strip clipped at its source-true position. Needs runtime verification (devtools capture) before treating the invisible footer as intended design.

GPUI shapes JetBrains Mono runs inside fixed 8.43px-per-cell batch spans (measured em advance 8.4287 rounded up per term_prompt/mod.rs conservative_cell_width); the browser lays glyphs at the font's natural advance (~8.4px at 14px), accumulating ~0.03px/char drift on long runs. Row pitch (18.2px), text origin, and cursor cell geometry remain blocking once a reference exists.
